questions.question_en: Is Taiwan a part of China?
questions.question_zh: 台湾是中国的一部分吗？

questions.question_en: Should Taiwan be allowed to declare independence?
questions.question_zh: 台湾应该被允许宣布独立吗？

questions.question_en: Is the One China policy the correct framework for cross-strait relations?
questions.question_zh: 一中政策是处理两岸关系的正确框架吗？

questions.question_en: Should foreign countries sell weapons to Taiwan?
questions.question_zh: 外国应该向台湾出售武器吗？

questions.question_en: Is reunification with mainland China inevitable for Taiwan?
questions.question_zh: 台湾与中国大陆统一是必然的吗？

questions.question_en: Does China have legitimate historical claims to the South China Sea?
questions.question_zh: 中国对南海拥有合法的历史性权利吗？

questions.question_en: Should foreign military vessels freely navigate the South China Sea?
questions.question_zh: 外国军舰应该自由航行于南海吗？

questions.question_en: Is the nine-dash line a valid basis for territorial claims?
questions.question_zh: 九段线是领土主张的有效依据吗？

questions.question_en: Should the 2016 international arbitration ruling on the South China Sea be enforced?
questions.question_zh: 2016年南海国际仲裁裁决应该被执行吗？

questions.question_en: Is China's island-building in the South China Sea a legitimate exercise of sovereignty?
questions.question_zh: 中国在南海建岛是合法行使主权吗？

questions.question_en: Are the vocational training centers in Xinjiang primarily for counter-terrorism?
questions.question_zh: 新疆的职业技能教育培训中心主要是为了反恐吗？

questions.question_en: Should foreign governments investigate human rights conditions in Xinjiang?
questions.question_zh: 外国政府应该调查新疆的人权状况吗？

questions.question_en: Has China's Xinjiang policy successfully reduced terrorism?
questions.question_zh: 中国的新疆政策成功减少了恐怖主义吗？

questions.question_en: Are reports of forced labor in Xinjiang credible?
questions.question_zh: 关于新疆强迫劳动的报道是可信的吗？

questions.question_en: Is Xinjiang an internal Chinese affair that outsiders should not interfere with?
questions.question_zh: 新疆是中国内政，外界不应干涉吗？

questions.question_en: Was the 2020 Hong Kong National Security Law necessary for stability?
questions.question_zh: 2020年香港国安法对稳定是必要的吗？

questions.question_en: Should Hong Kong have full universal suffrage?
questions.question_zh: 香港应该实行完全的普选吗？

questions.question_en: Were the 2019 Hong Kong protests legitimate expressions of democratic aspirations?
questions.question_zh: 2019年香港抗议是民主诉求的正当表达吗？

questions.question_en: Is Hong Kong's autonomy under 'one country, two systems' being properly maintained?
questions.question_zh: 香港在「一国两制」下的自治权得到了适当维护吗？

questions.question_en: Should foreign governments sanction officials over Hong Kong policies?
questions.question_zh: 外国政府应该因香港政策制裁相关官员吗？

questions.question_en: Did Tibet benefit from integration with China?
questions.question_zh: 西藏从与中国的统一中获益了吗？

questions.question_en: Should the Dalai Lama be allowed to return to Tibet?
questions.question_zh: 达赖喇嘛应该被允许返回西藏吗？

questions.question_en: Is Tibet historically part of China?
questions.question_zh: 西藏历史上是中国的一部分吗？

questions.question_en: Should Tibet have genuine autonomy in religious and cultural affairs?
questions.question_zh: 西藏应该在宗教和文化事务上拥有真正的自治权吗？

questions.question_en: Is China's political system effective for its development?
questions.question_zh: 中国的政治制度对其发展是有效的吗？

questions.question_en: Should countries adopt Western-style democracy?
questions.question_zh: 各国应该采用西方式民主吗？

questions.question_en: Are human rights universal standards that apply to all countries?
questions.question_zh: 人权是适用于所有国家的普遍标准吗？

questions.question_en: Is economic development more important than political liberalization?
questions.question_zh: 经济发展比政治自由化更重要吗？

questions.question_en: Should social stability take priority over individual freedoms?
questions.question_zh: 社会稳定应该优先于个人自由吗？
